# Simple test to verify server execution
# Test that we can successfully start the server

# Get the server command from the environment
exec printenv MCP_SERVER_COMMAND
stdout '@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything'

# Start the server and send a basic initialize request
# Create initialization request
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"TestClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}

# Start the server with the command
exec npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-everything stdio
stdin setstdin
stdout '"jsonrpc":"2.0"'
stdout '"id":1'
